title: Budget v's spend chart
excerpt: Similar to “Actual v’s Target” discussion.  I am looking for a chart solution (maybe stacked bar chart) where ‘numbers column’ values of budget v’s current spend.  Preferably represented in percentage of the budget.  Any…

posts.author: pematthe (Peter Matthews)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to “Actual v’s Target” discussion. I am looking for a chart solution (maybe stacked bar chart) where ‘numbers column’ values of budget v’s current spend. Preferably represented in percentage of the budget. Any ideas?

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@pematthe if an add-on is an option, you can use the Screenful’s table chart feature to compare budget with spent. Here’s an example chart:

CleanShot 2025-03-26 at 12.19.321640×367 96.4 KB

The chart can be placed into Monday dashboard or shared via email.
